'''zhayojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycofumigation|mycofumigation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-y-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycofumigation|mycofumigation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhayojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæyejeth|zhæyejeth]] || [[word:zhæyejej|zhæyejej]] || [[word:zhæyejesh|zhæyejesh]] || [[word:zhæyeje|zhæyeje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhayoyojoth|zhayoyojoth]] || [[word:zhayoyojoj|zhayoyojoj]] || [[word:zhayoyojosh|zhayoyojosh]] || [[word:zhayoyojo|zhayoyojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhayojoth|zhayojoth]] || [[word:zhayojoj|zhayojoj]] || [[word:zhayojosh|zhayojosh]] || [[word:zhayojo|zhayojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhayofjofth|zhayofjofth]] || [[word:zhayofjofj|zhayofjofj]] || [[word:zhayofjofsh|zhayofjofsh]] || [[word:zhayofjof|zhayofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhayojotho|zhayojotho]] || [[word:zhayojojo|zhayojojo]] || [[word:zhayojosho|zhayojosho]] || [[word:zhayojoko|zhayojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhayojoth|zhayojoth]] || [[word:zhayojoj|zhayojoj]] || [[word:zhayojosh|zhayojosh]] || [[word:zhayojo|zhayojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhayojothol|zhayojothol]] || [[word:zhayojojol|zhayojojol]] || [[word:zhayojoshol|zhayojoshol]] || [[word:zhayojokol|zhayojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhayojoothotho|zhayojoothotho]] || [[word:zhayojoojojo|zhayojoojojo]] || [[word:zhayojooshosho|zhayojooshosho]] || [[word:zhayojooko|zhayojooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhayojothon|zhayojothon]] || [[word:zhayojojon|zhayojojon]] || [[word:zhayojoshon|zhayojoshon]] || [[word:zhayojokon|zhayojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhayojothooro|zhayojothooro]] || [[word:zhayojojooro|zhayojojooro]] || [[word:zhayojoshooro|zhayojoshooro]] || [[word:zhayojokooro|zhayojokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|ebaeb35}}
